prompt: This method is supposed to return the most frequent word, but always returns the first word. What is the bug?
choices: freq.get(w) should use getOrDefault to avoid NullPointerException
The condition compares freq.get(w) with itself — it should compare freq.get(w) with freq.get(best)
HashMap.keySet() does not return words in frequency order
The loop variable w shadows the outer w from the first loop
explanation: freq.get(w) > freq.get(w) is always false because a value is never greater than itself. The condition should be freq.get(w) > freq.get(best) to compare the current word's count against the running best. Because the condition is always false, 'best' is never updated and the method returns the first word unchanged.
